name: Hwabao WP S&P Oil&Gas E&P QDII-LOF
summary: Hwabao WP S&P Oil&Gas E&P QDII-LOF is a fund that invests in oil and gas exploration and production companies, tracking the S&P Oil & Gas Exploration & Production Index, and is structured as a Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor (QDII) Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund allows mainland Chinese investors to access overseas markets. It is managed by Hwabao WP Fund Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
